# CWE-434: upload allowlist blocks executable/script extensions.
lang: go
file: CWE-434-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/rand"
	"encoding/hex"
	"net/http"
	"path/filepath"
	"strings"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func UploadAvatar(c *gin.Context) {
	file, err := c.FormFile("avatar")
	if err != nil {
		c.String(http.StatusBadRequest, err.Error())
		return
	}
	ext := strings.ToLower(filepath.Ext(file.Filename))
	if ext != ".png" && ext != ".jpg" {
		c.String(http.StatusBadRequest, "unsupported file type")
		return
	}
	var nonce [16]byte
	_, _ = rand.Read(nonce[:])
	dest := filepath.Join("/var/www/static/avatars", hex.EncodeToString(nonce[:])+ext)
	if err := c.SaveUploadedFile(file, dest); err != nil {
		c.String(http.StatusInternalServerError, "upload failed")
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"path": dest})
}
